🎉 Coming Fall 2026 · Utah

Run. Sip. Celebrate.
Utah's Most Fun Race.

Dirty Soda Run is a high-energy, social running experience inspired by Utah's iconic dirty soda culture — inclusive, family-friendly, and built for community.

Join the Waitlist 🥤
🏃

More Social Than Race

All paces welcome. Walk, jog, or run — it's about community, not competition.

👨‍👩‍👧

Family Friendly

Multiple race options for all ages, from kids dashes to 5K run/walks.

🎊

Epic Finish Area

Vibrant post-run celebration with brand activations and community vibes.

Race Options

Choose Your Adventure

Whether you're a seasoned runner or just here for the soda, there's a race distance with your name on it.

🏅

5K Run/Walk

The full dirty experience. 3.1 miles of fun, community, and soda energy.

🥤

1-Mile Fun Run

Perfect for beginners, casual movers, and anyone who came for the vibes.

⭐

Kids Dash

A specially designed sprint for the little ones. Big cheers, big smiles.

Get Event Announcements

A New Kind of Running Event

Dirty Soda Run is the first running experience built around Utah's iconic dirty soda culture — blending movement, community, and one of the state's most recognizable cultural trends into a single, high-energy event.

Launching in Utah in Fall 2026, with plans to expand nationally following its debut.

Partner With Us

Sponsorship Opportunities

Dirty Soda Run is built for brands that want to connect with an engaged, community-driven audience. From title sponsorships to local activations, we'd love to build something great together.
